Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/Aṭṭhakavagga/Kāmasu.text: Vi 3. 15; Abhi 2. 160; Ma 3. 293; Saṁ 3. 369; Khu 9. 330 piṭṭhādīsu.
Dī 1. 66; Aṁ 1. 111; Ma 2. 17; Khu 8. 65 piṭṭhe. 2. Aṁ 1. 112; Ma 2. 18 piṭṭhesu.
Vi 3. 1; Khu 1. 77; Ma 1. 328; Saṁ 1. 312; Abhi 2. 142; Abhi 4. 241 piṭṭhesu.

Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/X/Guhaṭṭhakasuttani.text: Pare na jānantūti na icchanti (Sī, Ka)
Dvīhi cittehi saṁyutā (Pāḷi), dvīhi cittehi samohitā (Sī)

Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/X/Jarāsuttaniddesav.text: ... yo hi -pa- uppajjati, so antoparisokoti vuccati. (Sī)

Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/X/Pasūrasuttaniddes.text: Yudhāyāti yaṁ panidaṁ kilamatthaṁ yuddhāya siyā (Sī, Syā)

variants.reading: Yudhāyāti yaṁ panidaṁ kilamatthaṁ yuddhāya siyā

Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/X/Purābhedasuttanid.text: Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 45; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 57; Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 455; Udāna-Ṭṭha 206 piṭṭhesupi passitabbaṁ.

Mahāniddesaṭṭhakathā/X/Kalahavivādasutta.text: Ñāṇadassanāyāti (Sī, Syā) 2. Ñāṇanipphādanatthāya (Sī, Syā) 3. Khu 7. 212 piṭṭhe.
